mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND MBR_PW = #{mbrPw} AND WITHDRAW_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(MBR_ID) FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId}
SELECT * FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND WITHDRAW_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET AGREE_OPTIONAL_YN = #{agreeOptionalYn} WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq}
UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET MARKETING_YN = #{marketingYn} WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq}
UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET MBR_PW = #{mbrPw} WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId}
